leadText: Gluttony redirects here. For the Ultra Beast codenamed UB Gluttony in Japanese, see Guzzlord (Pokأ©mon). Gluttony (Japanese: مپڈمپ„مپ—م‚“مپ¼مپ† Glutton) is an Ability introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Affected Berries 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Gluttony causes the Pokأ©mon to eat Berries that would normally be eaten at 25% HP or lower to be eaten at 50% HP or lower instead. It has no effect on Berries that activate at other HP thresholds (such as the Oran Berry , which is normally eaten at 50% HP or less) or Berries with non-HP-related trigger conditions (such as the Leppa Berry and Lum Berry ). Affected Berries [ edit | edit source ] In Generation VII , the Berries that may cause confusion , such as the Figy Berry and Mago Berry , are now eaten at 25% HP or less instead of being eaten at 50% HP or less, so are now affected by Gluttony. sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Gluttony causes the Pokأ©mon to eat Berries that would normally be eaten at 25% HP or lower to be eaten at 50% HP or lower instead. It has no effect on Berries that activate at other HP thresholds (such as the Oran Berry , which is normally eaten at 50% HP or less) or Berries with non-HP-related trigger conditions (such as the Leppa Berry and Lum Berry ). Affected Berries [ edit | edit source ] In Generation VII , the Berries that may cause confusion , such as the Figy Berry and Mago Berry , are now eaten at 25% HP or less instead of being eaten at 50% HP or less, so are now affected by Gluttony.
